About Us

PT SATWA MEDIKA UTAMA

SADITA is a leading force in veterinary pharmaceuticals, dedicated to enhancing animal welfare through rigorous scientific research and premium-grade manufacturing processes.

Corporate Profile 2024

Our Key Advantages

biotech

Standardized Equipment

Global medical-grade laboratory technologies.

SOP Production

verified

Quality Control

Full Documentation

description

Milestones

2012

Foundation of PT SATWA MEDIKA UTAMA with a vision for animal health.

2014

Expansion of research laboratory and pilot production facilities.

2015

First major pharmaceutical line launched focusing on antibiotics.

2018

Achieved national certification for standardized manufacturing excellence.

workspace_premium

CPOHB Certification

"Ensuring the highest standards of production as mandated by the Indonesian Ministry of Agriculture."
